hero.headingPrefix: Providing and building scalable software solutions with
hero.headingSuffix: across enterprise and modern web platforms.
hero.description: Results-driven software engineer based in Philippines, focused on solution architecture, performance optimization, and data-informed product delivery.

metrics.label: Manual Process Reduction
metrics.detail: Automated workflows and API integrations to improve operational efficiency.

metrics.detail: Led platform and migration work that boosted speed and scalability.

metrics.label: Reporting Effort Cut
metrics.detail: Built analytics dashboards that improved KPI visibility and reduced manual reporting.

metrics.label: Total Work Experience
metrics.detail: Professional experience across frontend, analytics, software engineering, and DevOps roles since 2022.

about.title: About
about.description: Results-driven Software Engineer experienced in delivering scalable full-stack applications, automating operational workflows, and improving system performance. Strong background in Next.js, React, Spring Boot, cloud deployment, and analytics tooling. Education: BS Information Technology (2023–2025) and Diploma in Information Communication Technology (2020–2023), Polytechnic University of the Philippines – Manila, graduated Cum Laude in March 2025.

experiences.description: Delivered low-code API integrations and workflow automations reducing manual operational processes by 25–40%, improved platform reliability, and streamlined intern onboarding/documentation to reduce repeat IT requests.

Built full-stack Next.js applications from Figma designs with responsive mobile-first UI and scalable backend APIs; led WordPress → Next.js migrations improving application performance by 30%+ and supporting consistent sprint delivery.

Developed production features for a consumer-facing platform using Spring Boot and Clean Architecture; assisted SQL → MongoDB migration to improve query performance while maintaining release stability.
Built interactive Power BI dashboards and performed multi-source data validation; reduced manual reporting by ~20% and improved data accuracy and visibility across stakeholders.
Developed responsive React + Tailwind components and implemented Cypress end-to-end tests, increasing regression coverage and reducing manual QA effort by ~30%.
Built responsive React + Material UI interfaces in an Agile Scrum environment and delivered sprint features on schedule with improved cross-device compatibility.

projects.title: ShieldPH — Cybersecurity Learning Platform
projects.description: Built a gamified cybersecurity education system with 10+ learning modules, threat simulations, progress tracking, and real-time updates to increase engagement and awareness.

projects.title: Pili-Pinas — MERN Travel Guide
projects.description: Developed a full-stack MERN application serving 5+ destinations with RESTful APIs, complete CRUD functionality, and validated end-to-end user journeys.

projects.title: Work Pulse — Time Tracking & Productivity Analytics
projects.description: Built a time tracking and task management system with clock-in/out, task monitoring, and analytics dashboards; optimized Vercel deployment for performance and reliability.

writing.title: Writing
writing.description: Recent posts on UI architecture, performance, and engineering workflow.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Open to software engineering opportunities, collaborations, and consulting work.
